name: R-7 / Vostok rocket
tagline: Carried Sputnik and Gagarin to orbit
description: The launcher that put Sputnik in orbit in 1957 and Yuri Gagarin into space in 1961. A direct ancestor of every Soyuz rocket flown since — the longest production lineage in spaceflight, with thousands of flights across six decades.
best_known_for: Carried Sputnik and Gagarin to orbit
